name: WP-5 — Settings + LearnerProfile: build verifyPersonOwnershipV2 + wire settings/learner-profile to v2
description: Build the verifyPersonOwnershipV2 write-guard (HIGH, enumeration §4.2) and wire settings.ts + learner-profile.ts onto v2. Ownership-scoping security-sensitive. Enumeration §3.1 / §6 WP-5.
acceptanceCriteria: verifyPersonOwnershipV2 is built TDD enforcing person ownership per the canonical to-be data model (docs/canon/identity/data-model.md) — canon wins, S0–S6 design choices are NOT canonical — with a negative-path break test (write to a non-owned person denied) demonstrated red-before-green. settings and learner-profile read/write v2, flag-gated; legacy intact until WP-FLAG. Unit + integration green.
riskImpact: HIGH write-guard: a gap allows writes to non-owned person records (privilege escalation across the ownership boundary).
